title: Can I take a message? — фразы

items.example: Hello, this is Maria Gonzalez speaking.
I'm calling about the job advertisement I saw online.
She's not available right now. Can I take a message?

items.phrase: Could you ask … to call me back?
items.translation: Не могли бы вы попросить … перезвонить мне?
items.example: Could you ask Mr Brown to call me back when he arrives?
One moment, I'll put you through to the reception desk.
Hold the line, please, I'll see if he is free.

items.phrase: I'm afraid the line is busy
items.example: I'm afraid the line is busy. Would you like to hold?
